pages.text: The $(l)Terrasteel Spell Blade$() represents the pinnacle of Botanical weaponry.$(br2)By fusing Terrasteel with arcane essence, you create a weapon that excels at both physical and magical combat.
Forge the blade using a Smithing Table with a Terra Sword, Arcane Essence, and Rune of Wrath.

pages.title: Attributes
pages.text: $(l)Attack Damage:$() 10$(br)$(l)Attack Speed:$() 1.6$(br)$(l)Durability:$() 3000$(br2)$(l)Bonuses:$()$(br)• +25% All Spell Power$(br)• +200 Max Mana$(br)• -20% Mana Cost$(br2)$(l)Passive:$() Attacks generate 500 Botania Mana (requires Mana Tablet in inventory)
